# diff-view

Generic side-by-side / text diff renderer. The domain-agnostic diff-rendering closure: `TextDiff` diffs two in-memory strings, `DiffView` / `DiffOrImageView` diff a worktree file against a git ref (with image-aware side-by-side), and `DiffRenderer` plus the shiki token helpers back both. This is a pure library primitive with no contributions — file-pane's `diff` plugin is a thin adapter that registers it as a `FilePane.Renderer`.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Generic side-by-side / text diff renderer primitive. Exposes TextDiff (two in-memory strings), DiffView/DiffOrImageView (worktree file vs a git ref), DiffRenderer, and the shiki token helpers.
- Web:
  - Uses: `infra/endpoints.EndpointError`, `infra/endpoints.fetchEndpoint`, `infra/endpoints.useEndpoint`, `primitives/css/center.Center`, `primitives/css/clip.Clip`, `primitives/css/column.Column`, `primitives/css/placeholder.Placeholder`, `primitives/css/scroll.Scroll`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/loading.Loading`, `primitives/syntax-highlight.getHighlighter`, `primitives/syntax-highlight.languageForPath`, `primitives/syntax-highlight.SHIKI_LANGS`, `primitives/syntax-highlight.themeForMode`, `primitives/syntax-highlight.useDarkMode`
  - Exports: Types: `DiffTokens`, `FileDiffState`, `ShikiTokenNode`; Values: `buildSideTokenMap`, `DiffOrImageView`, `DiffRenderer`, `DiffView`, `ImageDiffView`, `TextDiff`, `useDiffTokens`, `useFileDiff`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `config_v2/settings`, `conversations/conversation-view/code/file-pane/diff`, `conversations/conversation-view/commits-graph`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/tool-call/edit`, `review/code-review`, `review/plugin-changes/file-changes`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
